description: Global configuration for location details, Zelle payment instructions, staff roles (Phase 2), and notification preferences.

screens.description: Configure location details, Zelle payment info, and global preferences

features.description: Set business name, address, and contact details displayed on parent-facing pages

requirements.description: Admin can configure: business name, address, phone, email, website URL
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Settings are saved and used in parent-facing pages and email templates

features.description: Configure Zelle recipient details shown to parents after enrollment

requirements.description: Admin can configure Zelle payment instructions: recipient name, Zelle email or phone, and any custom instructions text
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Configured Zelle details appear on the enrollment confirmation page and in payment instruction emails

features.description: Admin configures when and how they receive system notifications

requirements.description: Admin can toggle receiving email notifications for: new lead received, new enrollment submitted, payment marked as received
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each notification type has an on/off toggle; admin receives emails only for enabled notifications

screens.description: Manage staff accounts and role permissions — Phase 2

features.description: Add staff members and assign roles with limited permissions

requirements.description: Admin can invite staff members by email and assign role-based access (view-only calendar, view-only enrollments)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Phase 2: Staff accounts can be created; permissions limit accessible modules

business_rules.rule: Zelle payment configuration must be set before the first program can be published
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Attempting to publish a program without Zelle configuration shows a setup prompt directing to settings

business_rules.rule: Location configuration supports one location in MVP; data model includes location_id for future multi-location support
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Single location is configured; all programs and leads are associated with this location
